rationale.summary: Switches the worker on URMA data-plane failure to keep the cache available.

keyPoints.point: fails over to a standby worker

critique_ledger.title: null deref on failover
critique_ledger.rationale: may crash when the standby is null

routed_questions.client-failover: Does the failover handle a null standby worker at line 42?
